summary: Post hosting-consolidation state: production backend serves from AWS App Runner (orcast-aws-backend); both Vercel upstreams (ORCAST_API_BASE, ORCAST_STREAM_BASE) resolve to App Runner. WS-STREAM streamed narration is live via the dedicated /api/narrate-stream Node route. The Cloudflare self-host co-tenant is retired as primary and dormant as rollback. Explore-session writes now reach RDS (200), resolving the DD-6 console impact.

reach.model: ORCAST_API_KEY via X-ORCAST-Key injected by the Vercel proxy + dedicated stream route
reach.cloudflare: retired as primary; orcast-api.aimez.ai dormant rollback only

rollback.status: dormant; RDS path degraded (DD-6) so not a clean fallback until repaired
rollback.revert: set Vercel ORCAST_API_BASE to https://orcast-api.aimez.ai and redeploy

tracked_limits: Self-host + Cloudflare ingress left dormant; physical teardown deferred to operator post-submission (DD-3/DD-10)
App Runner is the sole live backend; no warm fallback until self-host RDS (DD-6) is repaired
ONC disabled in prod: metadata-only/503 (DD-9, low, enable-on-demand)
explore3d frontend not deployed (DD-4/DD-9, medium, decision)
submission_gate: P1 (DynamoDB screenshot, Devpost, arXiv) parked until operator-approved
